Client Satisfaction

Why Healthcare Facilities Choose P&S Medical Device Inc.

With over 15 years in the medical equipment industry, we combine technical expertise with a commitment to patient care outcomes.

  • Quality Guaranteed

    Every device undergoes rigorous testing and certification before delivery.

  • Competitive Pricing

    Save 30-60% compared to new equipment without sacrificing performance.

  • Full Service & Support

    Installation, training, maintenance, and 24/7 emergency repair services.

  • Expert Consultation

    Our specialists help you choose the right equipment for your specific needs.

Request a Quote

Get pricing on any medical equipment in our inventory.

Ready to Upgrade Your Medical Equipment?

Whether you're buying, selling, or need service, our team is ready to help you find the perfect solution for your facility.

Get a Free ConsultationContact Us

Have Old Equipment to Sell?

We buy used, broken, or decommissioned medical devices at fair market prices. Get a same-day offer.

Get Your Offer NowContact Us
P&S Medical Device Inc.

Your trusted partner for premium medical imaging equipment. We provide sales, expert advisory, repair services, and equipment buybacks for healthcare facilities worldwide.
